name: Bold Signal
description: Dark gradient backdrop with a hot orange focal card and Archivo Black / Space Grotesk typography. Signature: oversized orange focal card as the stage's anchor + tabular section numbers. Built for pitch decks, product launches and statement chapters.
descriptionZh: 暗渐变底 + 大橙色焦点色卡 + Archivo Black / Space Grotesk 字体。签名：占位主角色卡 + 大编号制表数。适合 pitch deck、产品发布、宣言型章节。
bestFor: 产品发布 / 新品宣传
signatureElements: 对角线深色渐变舞台（左下→右上）
超大直角橙色焦点色卡
发光橙色 hero 数字（制表数编号）
